meaning: n.特效药,细节adj.详细而精确的,明确的,特殊的,特效的,[生物]种的
examples: His charge was to obtain specific information.
The money was collected for a specific purpose.
This year police were determined to combat theft and mounted a specific operation against would-be thieves.
But pinning mofongo to a specific place in Puerto Rico is challenging, if not outright impossible.
